bird.name: Tapajos antpitta
bird.summary: The Tapajos antpitta (Myrmothera subcanescens) is a species of bird in the family Grallariidae. It is endemic to Brazil.

locations.name: 亞馬遜盆地
locations.summary: 亞馬遜盆地（葡萄牙語：Bacia do rio Amazonas），又稱亞馬遜平原，是南美洲的亞馬遜河及其支流所流經之處，盆地與平原地形兼具。 地理 南美洲的亞馬遜雨林（60%面積位於巴西）位於亞馬遜盆地，是全球最大的雨林，佔地6百萬平方…

locations.name: 马代拉河
locations.summary: 马代拉河（葡萄牙語：Rio Madeira）是南美洲的河流，河道全長約3,350公里，是亞馬遜河右岸最長的支流。 2007年7月，巴西政府批准興建兩座用作水力發電的水壩，遭環境人士以破壞生態環境為由反對。

locations.name: 雨林
locations.summary: 雨林是雨量甚多的生物區系。雨林依位置的不同分热带雨林和溫帶雨林。雨林大多数靠近赤道，在赤道经过的非洲、亚洲和南美洲都有大片的雨林。湿润的气候保证了树和植物的快速生产。同时，树和植物也为雨林中的成千上万种生物提供了食物和庇护所。雨林曾經覆蓋…

relations.subject: Tapajos antpitta
relations.evidence: The Tapajos antpitta is found in the Amazon Basin of central Brazil, south of the Amazon and east of the Madeira River

relations.subject: Tapajos antpitta
relations.evidence: The Tapajos antpitta is found in the Amazon Basin of central Brazil, south of the Amazon and east of the Madeira River

relations.subject: Tapajos antpitta
relations.evidence: It inhabits humid rainforest in the lowlands

relations.subject: Tapajos antpitta
relations.evidence: "Due to its susceptibility to forest fragmentation, the species is threatened by the large-scale logging of forests for agricultural expansion." It occurs in several protected areas
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
